texto: I'm sarcastic and facetious. It's hard to find those people on the first encounter. I can be nice, but I don't want nice friends. I want funny, gregarious, sarcastic, and smart friends. It's so nice to hear you're not alone.
explicacao: Citação de Bertsche sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I'm sarcastic and facetious. It's hard to find those people on the first encounter. I can be nice…” articula reflexao, friends, sarcastic em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
